message:
fix: use try_from for u32 casts to avoid truncation

Replace `as u32` casts with `u32::try_from()` to handle cases where
the value might exceed u32::MAX. This produces a clear error instead
of silent truncation.

- protocol.rs: payload length check (>4GB payloads now error)
- encrypt.rs: similar pattern for encryption output size

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
